mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary policy that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS declines but 20-day SPX returns are negative in >60% of cases, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 300 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank rate hikes, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL exceeds 300 but 20-day SPX returns are positive in >60% of cases, or IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals robust supply-side expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: INDPRO and PAYEMS both rise but 20-day SPX returns are negative in >50% of cases, or interaction IC < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) combined with rising consumer spending (RSAFS) indicate elevated demand, pushing S&P 500 higher over 60 days.
failure_condition: HOUST and RSAFS both rise but 60-day SPX returns are negative in >50% of cases, or interaction IC < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) reflects tightening labor markets, increasing corporate pricing power and boosting S&P 500 returns over 5 days.
failure_condition: UNRATE declines but 5-day SPX returns are negative in >60% of cases, or IC < 0.03 over 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Surging housing permits (HOUST) above 1400 thousand units signal strong demand for construction, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: HOUST exceeds 1400 but 20-day SPX returns are negative in >60% of cases, or IC < 0.03 over 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) combined with declining capacity utilization signals overcapacity, pressuring earnings and lowering S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: INDPRO rises and UNRATE falls but 20-day SPX returns are positive in >50% of cases, or interaction IC < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A Fed funds rate above 4.5% indicates tightening monetary policy, increasing borrowing costs and reducing S&P 500 returns over 5 days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5% but 5-day SPX returns are positive in >60% of cases, or IC < 0.03 over 2-year window.
